metadata.description: A network edge gateway — routing / NAT / firewalling between network segments and to external networks. Grounded in the Kubernetes Gateway API 'Gateway' concept (a network entry/exit point); note UDLM's Network.Gateway is L3/edge (router/NAT/firewall), broader than the Gateway API's L4/L7 service focus. Vendor specifics (pfSense, OPNsense, vendor firewalls) are the provider/extension.

segments.description: Network segments the gateway bridges/routes between.

role.description: Segment role, e.g. wan | lan | dmz | mgmt.

vlan_ref.description: Reference (handle/uuid) to the Network.VLAN this segment rides — selected, not invented (foundational-resources). Replaces the inline 802.1Q id (R5).

external_address.description: Public/WAN address the gateway presents (NAT egress / ingress) once Realized.

relationships.description: Segments the gateway routes may have DHCP scopes served elsewhere.

relationships.name: segment_vlan
relationships.description: segment_vlan — each segment rides a Network.VLAN, referenced (vlan_ref), not an inline 802.1Q id (R5; foundational-resources selected-not-invented).
